moments.title: World Cup 2026 Heats Up
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026, hosted across North America from June 11 to July 19, is in full swing, with group stage or early knockout matches captivating fans worldwide.

angles.name: World Cup Fever
angles.copy: The World Cup 2026 is officially underway! Who are you backing for glory this year? Every game is a must-watch.

angles.name: Favourite Moments
angles.copy: Football fever has well and truly kicked in! What's been your favourite moment of the World Cup so far?

angles.name: Global Action
angles.copy: From Canada to Mexico to the USA, the World Cup 2026 is delivering non-stop action. Get ready for more!

moments.title: Wimbledon Fortnight in Full Swing
moments.blurb: The prestigious Wimbledon Championships are ongoing at the All England Club from June 29 to July 12, with top tennis players battling it out on the grass courts.

angles.name: Strawberries & Cream
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 is serving up ace after ace. Who's your pick for the trophy?

angles.name: Iconic Grass Courts
angles.copy: The iconic grass courts of Wimbledon are hosting the world's best. Catch all the action from SW19.

angles.name: Second Week Tension
angles.copy: It's the second week of Wimbledon and the tension is building. Who do you think will be lifting the trophy this weekend?

moments.title: Wireless Festival Takes Over
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival brings huge names in hip-hop, grime, and R&B to London this week, kicking off a massive weekend of music.

angles.name: Wireless Is HERE
angles.copy: Wireless Festival is HERE! Who are you most excited to see tear up the stage in London this weekend?

angles.name: London Buzzing
angles.copy: The capital is buzzing with Wireless Festival vibes! Expect massive sets and unforgettable moments.

angles.name: Epic Lineup
angles.copy: If you're heading to Wireless, get ready for an epic lineup of the biggest names in urban music. Don't miss a beat!

moments.title: TRNSMT Rocks Glasgow Green
moments.blurb: Glasgow Green is alive with TRNSMT Festival, showcasing a huge lineup of rock, indie, and pop acts to Scottish music fans this weekend.

angles.name: Glasgow Green Is The Place
angles.copy: Glasgow Green is the place to be! TRNSMT Festival is back, bringing the biggest bands to Scotland.

angles.name: Festival Atmosphere
angles.copy: Are you at TRNSMT this weekend? Get ready for an incredible festival atmosphere and non-stop tunes.

angles.name: Must-See Acts
angles.copy: Scotland's biggest music party, TRNSMT, is in full swing! Who's your must-see act on the lineup?

moments.title: Happy Birthday, Michelle Branch!
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Michelle Branch, known for hits like 'Everywhere' and 'Are You Happy Now?', celebrates her 43rd birthday today.

angles.name: Everywhere Singer
angles.copy: Happy 43rd Birthday today to the brilliant Michelle Branch! What's your favourite track from the 'Everywhere' singer?

angles.name: Celebrating Michelle
angles.copy: Celebrating Michelle Branch's birthday today! The 'Are You Happy Now?' singer is 43.

angles.name: Powerful Anthems
angles.copy: Today, Michelle Branch turns 43! Still delivering those powerful rock-pop anthems.

moments.title: Happy Birthday, Ashley Tisdale!
moments.blurb: Actress and singer Ashley Tisdale, widely known for her role as Sharpay Evans in Disney Channel's High School Musical, turns 41 today.

angles.name: Fabulous Ashley
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday today to the fabulous Ashley Tisdale! What's your favourite 'High School Musical' moment?

angles.name: Disney Star
angles.copy: Celebrating Ashley Tisdale's birthday today! The Disney star and singer is 41.

angles.name: Troy & Sharpay
angles.copy: Today, Ashley Tisdale turns 41! Still a Troy and Sharpay fan? We are!

moments.title: Synth-Pop Legend Vince Clarke's Birthday
moments.blurb: Vince Clarke, the visionary musician behind iconic synth-pop bands Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, turns 66 tomorrow.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday tomorrow to synth-pop pioneer Vince Clarke! From Depeche Mode to Erasure, a true electronic music legend.

angles.name: Iconic Tracks
angles.copy: Celebrating Vince Clarke's birthday tomorrow! The genius behind so many iconic 80s and 90s tracks is 66.

angles.name: Electronic Genius
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we wish a very happy 66th birthday to Vince Clarke! What's your favourite track from his incredible career?

moments.title: Happy Birthday, Ginger Spice!
moments.blurb: Geri Halliwell, the iconic 'Ginger Spice' from the best-selling female group Spice Girls, celebrates her 54th birthday this Saturday.

angles.name: Ginger Spice Turns 54
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday this Saturday to the one and only Ginger Spice, Geri Halliwell! What's your favourite Spice Girls track?

angles.name: Girl Power Icon
angles.copy: It's Geri Halliwell's birthday on Saturday! Still flying the flag for Girl Power after all these years.

angles.name: 90s Pop Legend
angles.copy: This Saturday, we're celebrating the birthday of Geri Halliwell! The Spice Girls legend is 54.

moments.title: Happy Birthday, Huey Lewis!
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, charismatic frontman of the hugely popular 80s band Huey Lewis and the News, celebrates his 76th birthday this Saturday.

angles.name: Hip To Be Square
angles.copy: It's hip to be square! Happy 76th Birthday this Saturday to the legendary Huey Lewis!

angles.name: Heart of Rock & Roll
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 76th birthday to Huey Lewis on Saturday! Still 'The Heart of Rock & Roll'.

angles.name: Go-To Track
angles.copy: Celebrating Huey Lewis's birthday this Saturday! What's your go-to track from Huey Lewis and the News?

moments.title: 50 Cent Turns 51
moments.blurb: Multi-platinum selling rapper, actor, and entrepreneur 50 Cent (Curtis Jackson) celebrates his 51st birthday this Monday.

angles.name: Go Shorty
angles.copy: Go shorty, it's your birthday! 50 Cent turns 51 this Monday. What's your favourite track from the hip-hop icon?

angles.name: In Da Club Hitmaker
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to 50 Cent this Monday! The 'In Da Club' hitmaker is 51.

angles.name: Still Making Moves
angles.copy: Celebrating 50 Cent's 51st birthday on Monday! Still making moves in music and beyond.

moments.title: Celebrating Ringo Starr
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday this Tuesday, continuing his iconic musical journey.

angles.name: Peace and Love
angles.copy: Peace and love! Ringo Starr turns 86 this Tuesday. What's your favourite Beatles song featuring his drumming?

angles.name: True Legend
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday this Tuesday to the one and only Ringo Starr! A true legend of rock and roll.

angles.name: Still Drumming
angles.copy: The Beatles' drummer, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday this Tuesday. Still drumming up a storm!

moments.title: Celebrating Suzanne Vega
moments.blurb: Iconic folk-pop singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', celebrates her 67th birthday next Friday.

angles.name: Luka, I Live...
angles.copy: Luka, I live on the second floor... Happy 67th Birthday next Friday to the incredible Suzanne Vega!

angles.name: Still Captivating
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 67th birthday to Suzanne Vega next Friday! The 'Tom's Diner' singer is still captivating.

angles.name: Folk-Pop Legend
angles.copy: Next Friday, Suzanne Vega turns 67! What's your favourite track from the folk-pop legend?

moments.title: Jaden Smith Turns 28

angles.copy: Happy 28th Birthday next Monday to Jaden Smith! From acting to music, he's always pushing boundaries.

moments.title: Courtney Love Turns 62
moments.blurb: Frontwoman of Hole and alternative rock icon, Courtney Love, celebrates her 62nd birthday next Tuesday.

moments.blurb: Renowned musician and producer Jack White, best known as the frontman of The White Stripes, turns 51 next Tuesday.

angles.copy: Celebrating Jack White's birthday next Tuesday! A modern rock icon turning 51.

angles.copy: Next Tuesday, Jack White celebrates his 51st birthday! From The White Stripes to solo success, a true innovator.

moments.title: Happy Birthday, Richie Sambora!
moments.blurb: Former Bon Jovi lead guitarist and rock icon Richie Sambora celebrates his 67th birthday next Thursday.

angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 67th birthday to Richie Sambora next Thursday! The Bon Jovi guitarist is still rocking.

moments.title: Lil' Kim Turns 52
moments.blurb: Iconic rapper, fashion trailblazer, and Queen Bee, Lil' Kim, celebrates her 52nd birthday next Thursday.
